meta.reference: Zhao et al. 2017 — Mech. Systems & Signal Processing

0.name: NORMAL
0.action: Continue normal operation — all parameters within design limits

1.name: ADVISORY
1.action: Inspect and replace mechanical seal — check shaft run-out
1.root_cause: Worn seal faces, thermal shock, dry running or contamination

2.name: CRITICAL
2.action: SHUTDOWN IMMEDIATELY — replace bearings, inspect shaft and lubrication
2.root_cause: Fatigue spalling, inadequate lubrication or contamination ingress

3.name: WARNING
3.action: Realign shaft and coupling immediately — inspect coupling element
3.root_cause: Thermal growth, soft foot, piping strain or foundation settling

4.name: WATCH
4.action: Schedule rotor balancing — monitor 1X vibration amplitude trend
4.root_cause: Mass eccentricity due to erosion, deposits or impeller damage

5.name: CAUTION
5.action: Check NPSH margin, suction conditions — reduce pump load immediately
5.root_cause: Insufficient NPSH, high fluid temperature or blocked suction
